summary: Static code analysis completed for the new 'Help someone else feel understood' share section in Settings screen. All requirements verified through code inspection.
critical_code_review_comments: TypeScript compilation shows module resolution errors (expected in RN environment without node_modules) and implicit 'any' type warnings - these are type-checking issues, not runtime errors
All imports are correct: Share from 'react-native', Heart from 'lucide-react-native', Clipboard from 'expo-clipboard'

success_rate.backend: N/A - React Native app, no backend to test

context_for_next_testing_agent: This is a React Native/Expo app. No web server runs. Testing was static code analysis only.
